evals.prompt: Audit the QuickAddInput component for mobile interaction issues. Check keyboard handling, touch targets, focus behavior, and any edge cases that could break on phones.
evals.expected_output: A structured mobile audit report covering virtual keyboard handling, touch target sizes, focus/scroll behavior, inputMode attributes, and iOS/Android specific issues for QuickAddInput.tsx

evals.prompt: Review the BottomNav component and the overall mobile layout for safe area issues, touch target sizing, and responsive behavior. Include orientation change handling.
evals.expected_output: A structured mobile audit report covering safe area inset usage, viewport-fit=cover, touch target measurements, orientation handling, and bottom navigation UX on mobile devices.

evals.prompt: Do a mobile audit of the AiChatOverlay component. Focus on how it handles the virtual keyboard, scroll behavior in the chat messages area, the input area interaction, and safe area insets.
evals.expected_output: A structured mobile audit report covering keyboard interaction with the chat input, scroll container behavior, safe area handling, overlay positioning on mobile, and any iOS Safari specific issues.
